name: Punjabi-Style Garam Masala
recipeIngredient: 3 blades of mace (OR... 1/4 teaspoon ground mace)
recipeInstructions:
A little of this warm, spicy blend goes a long way. Coming from North India, where meat is eaten more frequently than in the South, it is the kind of masala that's popular as an accompaniment for almost any meat dish, as a condiment or in the sauce.
1. Toast the whole spices (mace, peppercorns, cloves, cinnamon) and bay leaf until fragrant.
2. Grind all toasted ingredients with the remaining ground spices to a fine powder. Mix well.
